issues.detail: The skill examples do not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
The skill is specific to Node.js and does not provide cross-platform or multi-agent compatibility.

scenarios.name: invoice-with-table
scenarios.rationale: Baseline pipes a PDFDocument and ends it but inlines text rows instead of a real table; treatment uses positioned column text with a separator line via moveTo/lineTo/stroke, matching the skill's manual table pattern.

scenarios.name: multi-page-with-page-numbers
scenarios.rationale: Baseline cannot show 'Page X of N' because it never buffers pages; treatment uses bufferPages, bufferedPageRange().count, switchToPage(i), and doc.page.height as the skill describes.
